constraints: repo files and repo validation commands only

assertions.title: CI workflow triggers on PR and main branch push

steps.expected: Workflow runs on pull_request and push to main

assertions.title: CI enforces lint before typecheck/test/build

steps.expected: Dedicated Lint step running 'bun run lint' before typecheck/test/build
steps.observed: Workflow contains Typecheck, Build, Run test suite, and Verify Docker build steps, but no Lint step

steps.expected: Command exists and non-zero exit would gate CI if wired

evidence.observation: Lint script exists in package.json, but workflow does not invoke it

assertions.issues: Mandatory CI workflow lacks the required lint step and therefore does not enforce lint before later gates.

steps.action: Inspect workflow and package scripts for typecheck
steps.expected: Workflow runs bun run typecheck and script maps to tsc --noEmit
steps.observed: Workflow has Typecheck step running bun run typecheck; package.json maps typecheck to 'tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.json'

steps.expected: Typecheck completes with zero exit on healthy repo

steps.action: Inspect workflow and package scripts for test execution
steps.expected: Workflow runs bun run test and script maps to vitest run
steps.observed: Workflow has Run test suite step with bun run test; package.json maps test to 'vitest run'
Command exited 0; 57 files and 539 tests passed

assertions.title: Coverage threshold is non-zero and CI-gated

steps.observed: Coverage thresholds for statements, branches, functions, and lines are all 0

steps.action: Inspect workflow for coverage-mode test command
steps.expected: Workflow runs coverage-enforced tests (for example bun run test -- --coverage)
steps.observed: Workflow only runs bun run test without coverage flag or dedicated coverage script

assertions.issues: Coverage thresholds are zero and the workflow does not execute a coverage-enforced test command.

steps.action: Inspect workflow and package scripts for build
steps.expected: Workflow runs bun run build and script maps to tsc -p tsconfig.json
steps.observed: Workflow has Build step running bun run build; package.json maps build to 'tsc -p tsconfig.json'

assertions.title: Endpoint script suite remains outside mandatory workflow gate

steps.action: Inspect workflow steps for endpoint smoke scripts
steps.expected: Mandatory workflow does not invoke bun run test:endpoint or test:endpoint:*
steps.observed: No endpoint smoke script commands appear in .github/workflows/test.yml
package.json defines test:endpoint and multiple test:endpoint:* scripts separately

evidence.observation: Endpoint scripts are defined but not part of mandatory test workflow

assertions.title: CI validates container build integrity

steps.action: Inspect workflow for Docker build verification step
steps.observed: Workflow includes Verify Docker build step running docker build -t opengecko-test .

steps.expected: Docker build exits 0 if container image is buildable
steps.observed: Command exited 1 during bun install because node-gyp in the container could not find Python while building better-sqlite3

evidence.observation: Build fails at Dockerfile RUN bun install --frozen-lockfile with 'Could not find any Python installation to use' from node-gyp/better-sqlite3

assertions.issues: Workflow includes the container build gate, but the actual Docker build currently fails, so container build integrity is not satisfied.

frictions.description: The full vitest suite is long-running because market refresh timeout tests each take about 60 seconds.
frictions.resolution: Allowed the suite to complete and recorded the final passing summary.

frictions.description: Validator guidance expected serialized repo-quality-gate runs; command evidence was collected once per required gate without starting services.
frictions.resolution: Recorded one execution result for lint, typecheck, test, build, and docker build.

summary: Tested 8 assertions: 5 passed and 3 failed. Failures were VAL-QA-002 (no lint step in CI workflow), VAL-QA-005 (zero coverage thresholds and no coverage-gated CI command), and VAL-QA-008 (Docker build gate exists but local docker build failed during bun install because Python was unavailable in the container).
